revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿二]][[zh:七月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿二]][[zh:七月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿二]][[zh:七月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿二]][[zh:七月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 22|qq=July 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}} , {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672|1=672}} ) – {{ill|Jinshin War|en|Jinshin War|qid=Q2378252|lt=Jinshin War|1=Jinshin War}} : The {{ill|Battle of Seta River|ja|瀬田川の戦い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Battle of Seta River|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} took place between the forces of {{ill|Prince Ōama|ja|大海人皇子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Ōama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天武天皇|1=Emperor Tenmu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} (later Emperor Tenmu) and the army of {{ill|Emperor Kōbun|en|Emperor Kōbun|qid=Q357242|lt=Emperor Kōbun|1=Emperor Kōbun}} (Prince Ōtomo)'s Ōmi Court. Emperor Kōbun committed suicide the following day. * Year 1 of {{ill|Ten'yō|en|Ten'yō|qid=Q1194175|lt=Ten'yō|1=Ten'yō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} , {{ill|1144|en|1144|qid=Q19619|lt=1144|1=1144}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinori|ja|藤原通憲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Michinori|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 信西|1=Fujiwara no Michinori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q711600}} took Buddhist vows, assuming the name {{ill|Fujiwara no Michinori|en|Fujiwara no Michinori|qid=Q711600|lt=Shinsei|1=Fujiwara no Michinori}} , later known as the "Black-Robed Chancellor" ({{ill|Kokui no Saishō|ja|黒衣の宰相|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokui no Saishō|1=kokue|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11678819}} ). * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyūan|en|Kyūan|qid=Q1193860|lt=Kyūan|1=Kyūan}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1145|en|1145|qid=Q19624|lt=1145|1=1145}} ) – Due to the appearance of a comet, the era name changed from {{ill|Ten'yō|en|Ten'yō|qid=Q1194175|lt=Ten'yō|1=Ten'yō}} to Kyūan. * Year 2 of {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Ken'nin|1=Kennin}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} , {{ill|1202|en|1202|qid=Q5226|lt=1202|1=1202}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoriie|en|Minamoto no Yoriie|qid=Q431052|lt=Minamoto no Yoriie|1=Minamoto no Yoriie}} was appointed {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Seii Taishōgun|1=Shogun}} . * Year 18 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1549|en|1549|qid=Q6554|lt=1549|1=1549}} ) – {{ill|Francis Xavier|en|Francis Xavier|qid=Q163900|lt=Francis Xavier|1=Francis Xavier}} , a missionary of the {{ill|Jesuits|en|Jesuits|qid=Q36380|lt=Society of Jesus|1=Jesuits}} , landed in Kagoshima, introducing {{ill|Christianity|en|Christianity|qid=Q5043|lt=Christianity in Japan|1=Christianity}} . * Year 2 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} , {{ill|1790|en|1790|qid=Q7775|lt=1790|1=1790}} ) – The {{ill|First Urakami Incident|ja|浦上一番崩れ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/First Urakami Incident|1=1790 Urakami crackdown|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17217747}} : 19 villagers from Urakami, Hizen Province, were the first to be arrested as {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|qid=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}} .
== Births == * Year 4 of {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} , {{ill|1651|en|1651|qid=Q6956|lt=1651|1=1651}} ) – {{ill|Aoyama Tadao|en|Aoyama Tadao|qid=Q4778835|lt=Aoyama Tadao|1=Aoyama Tadao}} , 2nd {{ill|Hamamatsu Domain|en|Hamamatsu Domain|qid=Q3034440|lt=Hamamatsu Domain|1=Hamamatsu Domain}} lord (d. {{ill|1685|en|1685|qid=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 12 of {{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|qid=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei|1=Shōhei}} / Year 2 (Intercalary) of {{ill|Enbun|ja|Enbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enbun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} , {{ill|1357|en|1357|qid=Q6135|lt=1357|1=1357}} ) – {{ill|Saionji Neishi|en|Saionji Neishi|qid=Q7223450|lt=Saionji Kishi|1=Saionji Neishi}} , consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Fushimi|en|Emperor Go-Fushimi|qid=Q440454|lt=Emperor Go-Fushimi|1=Emperor Go-Fushimi}} (b. {{ill|1292|en|1292|qid=Q5555|lt=1292|1=1292}} ). * Year 16 of [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|September 1|en|September 1|qid=Q2859|lt=September 1|1=September 1}} , {{ill|1409|en|1409|qid=Q6144|lt=1409|1=1409}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Mitsukane|en|Ashikaga Mitsukane|qid=Q4307089|lt=Ashikaga Mitsukane|1=Ashikaga Mitsukane}} , 3rd {{ill|Kantō kubō|en|Kantō kubō|qid=Q860777|lt=Kamakura kubō|1=Kantō kubō}} (b. {{ill|1378|en|1378|qid=Q6306|lt=1378|1=1378}} ). * Year 20 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1592|en|1592|qid=Q6769|lt=1592|1=1592}} ) – {{ill|Ōmandokoro|en|Ōmandokoro|qid=Q5353737|lt=Ōmandokoro|1=Ōmandokoro}} , mother of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (b. {{ill|1513|en|1513|qid=Q6200|lt=1513|1=1513}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|21|7|23|6|22|8|7|0722|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
